name: Presidio Property Trust, Inc.
business: Presidio Property Trust is an internally-managed REIT that invests in a diversified multi-tenant portfolio of office, industrial, and retail properties, as well as model homes leased back to homebuilders under triple-net leases. The company owns 10 commercial properties and has partial interests in two others, along with 80 model homes as of December 31, 2025. Its commercial properties are located in Colorado, North Dakota, California, Maryland, and Texas, while model homes are primarily in Texas.

exposures.sentence: Our Model Home Properties are leased back, on a triple-net basis, to homebuilders.
Beginning in 2015, we began to focus our commercial portfolio primarily on office and industrial properties ( Office/Industrial Properties ) and model homes ( Model Home Properties ).

One retail shopping center ( Retail Properties ) which totals approximately 10,500 rentable square feet.
